task_completion.description: Locate the original crashed aircraft in the Aerobridge system
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Aerobridge aircraft list or search results displaying the aircraft with registration 'SH-CRASH-001'.

task_completion.description: Rename the crashed aircraft to indicate it is a write-off
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an edit screen, detail view, or updated aircraft list showing the registration changed exactly to 'SH-CRASH-001 [WRITE-OFF]'.

task_completion.description: Set the status of the crashed aircraft to inactive
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a toggle, dropdown, or status indicator on the 'SH-CRASH-001 [WRITE-OFF]' aircraft showing its status as 'inactive', 'disabled', or unchecked 'active' state.
Look for a new aircraft creation form or an updated aircraft list showing a newly added aircraft with the registration 'SH-REPL-002'.

task_completion.description: Assign the replacement aircraft to the correct operator
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the aircraft details or creation screen for 'SH-REPL-002' showing the Operator field set to 'SkyHigh Services'.

task_completion.description: Assign the replacement aircraft to the correct manufacturer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the aircraft details or creation screen for 'SH-REPL-002' showing the Manufacturer field set to 'DroneCorp Global'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Aerobridge web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing a web browser with the Aerobridge application loaded, rather than terminal windows executing database commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with actual forms and buttons
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of typing in input fields, selecting from dropdowns, and clicking save/submit buttons, rather than just modifying HTML via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the final state is shown within the context of the Aerobridge system's UI, not written in a notepad, text editor, or terminal echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The crashed aircraft registration is 'SH-CRASH-001'. The replacement aircraft registration must be 'SH-REPL-002'. The target operator for the replacement is 'SkyHigh Services'. The target manufacturer for the replacement is 'DroneCorp Global'.
